calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jan-08-2018 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Jan-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Inventory & Appraisal
Off Calendar May-17-2016 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-15-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margo Rickher & Marlene Johnson in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it prefers to have administrators represented by counsel as there are lots of steps to go through. Ms. Rickher explained that she is a licensed attorney in inactive status, that she practices family law which deals with accountings and tax issues, that both of the petitioners have experience in accounting and taxes, that they understand that this estate is not complicated, that it does not include a business or a mortgage, that they have evaluated the securities in the brokerage firm, that they had the property in Mariposa County assessed 10 years ago and that they hope to waive the need for a probate referee. The Court stated that it would not waive the probate referee and asked Ms. Rickher to go through the next steps for the court. Ms. Rickher responded with marshal assets, obtain a tax I.D., send out death certificates, complete an Inventory & Appraisal with the probate referee, complete an accounting and final distribution. The Court stated that distribution cannot happen without a court order. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration (subject to review of the order). A status for filing the Inventory & Appraisal was set for May 17, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The status on close of the estate was set for January 8, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
